_comment: Shipped preset for Multiangle via Qwen-Image-Edit 2511 + fal Multiple-Angles LoRA. Ported from the V1 api-format workflow in workflows_backup/. The 19-node pipeline rescales the source image to Qwen-friendly size (FluxKontextImageScale), captures the source's natural width/height (GetImageSize) so the final ImageScale can put the output back at the source's dimensions. MultiangleStage's `_multiangle_prompt()` already builds the canonical `<sks> [az] [el] [dist]` string on the Python side and sends it as main_prompt — the workflow just routes it into the positive text encoder.
label: Qwen Edit 2511 Multiangle
description: Re-render the source image from a chosen camera angle via Qwen-Image-Edit 2511 + fal Multiple-Angles LoRA + Lightning 4-step LoRA. The Stage's 3D camera widget drives the LoRA's required `<sks> [az] [el] [dist]` prompt automatically. Output preserves the source image's resolution.

image.error: Multiangle needs an upstream image — wire one into the stage's image input.

prompt.default: <sks> front view eye-level shot medium shot
